data.title: LibertyStream progresses with Texas refining unit; wins $500,000 grant for North Dakota battery initiative. #LIB.v
data.description: LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners Inc. (Stock symbols: TSXV: LIB, OTCQB: VLTLF, FSE: I2D) is making strides in installing its lithium carbonate refining unit in Texas as part of its plan to expand domestic lithium production. The company, along with North Dakota partner Wellspring Hydro, secured a significant milestone by receiving a US$500,000 grant from the State of North Dakota. This development signifies progress towards their goal of boosting lithium production capabilities.

data.title: Funko (Nasdaq: FNKO) to discuss Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 6, 2025, at 4:30pm ET. Webcast available. Replay on website.
data.description: Funko, Inc. will be conducting a conference call on Thursday, November 6, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET to review its financial performance for the third quarter that concluded on September 30, 2025. The call, accessible on the investor relations segment of the Funko website at https://investor.funko.com, will also be webcast. Following the call, a replay of the webcast will be accessible on the same website. Funko, Inc. operates as a prominent pop culture lifestyle brand and is listed as FNKO on the Nasdaq, reflecting its position as a key player in the industry.

data.title: Robert Huffines appointed to Insulet Corporation's Board of Directors, effective Oct 31, 2025. Former Global Chair of Investment Banking at JP Morgan Chase & Co. Joined as independent director.
data.description: Insulet Corporation, a leading company in tubeless insulin pump technology with its Omnipod® brand, has appointed Robbie L. Huffines, former Global Chair of Investment Banking at JP Morgan Chase & Co., as an independent director to its board. This appointment is effective from October 31, 2025. Mr. Huffines will also serve on the board's Audit Committee, bringing valuable expertise to the company. Insulet Corporation trades on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol PODD.

data.title: BJ’s Wholesale Club donates $1.2 million to help families in 17 states, Washington D.C. meet essential needs.
data.description: A donation exceeding $1.2 million has been pledged by BJ’s Wholesale Club (NYSE: BJ) to support various local organizations across 17 states and Washington, D.C. The recipients were nominated by BJ’s team members and the funds will be directed towards initiatives such as hunger relief in Virginia and after-school programs in Connecticut. The Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of BJ’s, Bob Eddy, emphasized the company's commitment to assisting families in meeting their essential needs as part of their core mission.

data.title: D-Wave Quantum to release Q3 fiscal year 2025 financial results on Nov 6, 2025. Visit their Investor Relations website for details.
data.description: D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS), a prominent player in the quantum computing industry, is set to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025 that concluded on September 30, 2025. The official announcement is scheduled to be made on Thursday, November 6 before the market opens. Interested parties can access the press release via the D-Wave Investor Relations website at https://ir.dwavesys.com/. Additionally, D-Wave will be conducting a conference call on the same day.

data.title: SymphonyAI introduces IRIS Forge in IRIS Foundry for creating AI applications in hours instead of months for industrial market.
data.description: SymphonyAI, headquartered in Palo Alto, California, has launched IRIS Forge, a new feature in the IRIS Foundry Industrial AI platform. This innovation allows manufacturing and process teams to swiftly develop, implement, and expand AI-driven applications within hours rather than months. IRIS Foundry acts as the consolidated industrial data base, linking assets, systems, and processes via a secure DataOps layer. This advancement is designed to enhance operational efficiency and productivity in manufacturing sectors.

data.title: SymphonyAI introduces Sensa Risk Intelligence to enhance financial compliance with AI, aiming to reduce costs and enhance accuracy.
data.description: SymphonyAI, headquartered in Palo Alto, California, has introduced Sensa Risk Intelligence (SRI), a new AI platform tailored for financial institutions. The platform draws on years of experience in regulatory and financial crime to provide enhanced risk detection capabilities. SRI aims to assist institutions in cutting compliance expenses, enhancing detection precision, and updating their systems securely. As compliance requirements change and alert levels rise, such a solution becomes crucial for institutions aiming to streamline operations effectively.

data.title: Accelsius showcases AI cooling at NVIDIA GTC event in Washington D.C, as a Silver Sponsor. Keynote by CEO Jensen Huang. Booth #534.
data.description: Accelsius, a prominent company specializing in two-phase direct-to-chip liquid cooling technology, has revealed its role as a Silver Sponsor at NVIDIA GTC in Washington, D.C. The event is scheduled to occur from October 27th to 29th at the Walter E. Washington Convention Center. The conference aims to unite policymakers, researchers, and industry executives to discuss the evolving landscape of AI infrastructure and creativity. Jensen Huang, the founder and CEO of NVIDIA, is set to deliver the keynote speech. Accelsius will showcase its innovations at Booth #534 during the event.

data.title: Rockwell Automation (NYSE: ROK) to report Q4 and full year fiscal 2025 results on Nov. 6 before market opens. Call at 7:30am CST.
data.description: Milwaukee-based Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) is set to announce its Q4 and full-year fiscal 2025 results and provide guidance for fiscal 2026 on Thursday, November 6th before the market opens. The information will be available on the Rockwell Investor Relations website. A conference call to review the quarterly results will take place at 7:30 a.m. CST on the same day. The call will be audio webcast and can be accessed on the company's website.

data.title: Universal Electronics Inc. will host Q3 2025 financial results call on Nov 6 in Scottsdale, Arizona. #UEIC
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Universal Electronics Inc. is set to hold a conference call on November 6th to discuss their financial results for the third quarter of 2025. This event will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's performance during this period. It is an opportunity for investors, analysts, and the media to hear about the numbers and strategies of UEIC. Stay tuned for updates on the outcomes of this conference call and the key figures revealed.

data.title: T-Mobile reports record customer growth with 2.3 million total postpaid net additions, 1.0 million postpaid phone net additions. Stocks raised across the board.
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) reported exceptional customer growth driven by a strong market position. The company achieved significant milestones with total postpaid net customer additions reaching 2.3 million, marking a new industry record. Of this, postpaid phone net customer additions stood at 1.0 million, the highest in Q3 in over ten years and leading in the industry. Additionally, postpaid net account additions increased by 26% year-over-year to 396 thousand, setting a new benchmark and standing out as the best in the industry. T-Mobile's success can be attributed to its focus on providing the best network, best value, and best customer experiences, thereby establishing a competitive edge in the market.

data.title: Codexis (NASDAQ: CDXS) to announce Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 6, 2025, conference call at 4:30 pm ET.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, on October 23, 2025, Codexis, Inc., a prominent company specializing in enzymatic solutions for the efficient production of complex therapeutics, disclosed its plan to disclose financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on Thursday, November 6, 2025, after market hours. The company, listed under NASDAQ as CDXS, will have its management conduct a conference call and webcast at 4:30 pm Eastern Time to review the financial outcomes and offer a business update.
